questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "similar"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "different"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "popular"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "crowded"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "comfortable"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "difficult"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "interesting"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "beautiful"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "modern"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "ancient"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "quality"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "least"?
Choose the best word: Math is more _____ for me.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Math is more difficult for me." — từ đúng là "difficult" (khó).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This book is more _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This book is more interesting." — từ đúng là "interesting" (thú vị).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Spring is the most _____ season.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Spring is the most beautiful season." — từ đúng là "beautiful" (đẹp).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The new building is more _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The new building is more modern." — từ đúng là "modern" (hiện đại).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This is the most _____ temple.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This is the most ancient temple." — từ đúng là "ancient" (cổ xưa).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This brand has better _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This brand has better quality." — từ đúng là "quality" (chất lượng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: It is the _____ expensive option.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It is the least expensive option." — từ đúng là "least" (ít nhất).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Both are _____ good.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Both are equally good." — từ đúng là "equally" (ngang nhau).

questions.question: Choose the best word: It is _____ as big as mine.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It is nearly as big as mine." — từ đúng là "nearly" (gần như).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Russia is the _____ country.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Russia is the largest country." — từ đúng là "largest" (lớn nhất).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Lead is _____ than wood.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Lead is heavier than wood." — từ đúng là "heavier" (nặng hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Plastic is _____ than metal.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Plastic is lighter than metal." — từ đúng là "lighter" (nhẹ hơn).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: An elephant is ___ than a dog.
Complete the sentence: This is the ___ film I've ever seen.
Complete the sentence: Maths is ___ than English for me.
Complete the sentence: She is the ___ student in class.
Complete the sentence: Today is ___ than yesterday.
questions.explanation: Short adjective comparative doubles the consonant.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: A car is ___ expensive than a bike.
questions.explanation: Use 'more' for comparative of long adjectives.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: This is the ___ book in the shop.
Complete the sentence: My bag is ___ as yours.
Complete the sentence: Traffic is ___ on Mondays.
Complete the sentence: Russia is the ___ country in the world.
Which English word means "tương tự"?
Which English word means "khác nhau"?
Which English word means "phổ biến"?
Which English word means "đông đúc"?
Which English word means "thoải mái"?
Which English word means "khó"?
